function.name: _company_app_group_update
function.description: Update an existing application group in the company. Must specify the group ID and list the fields to be updated in updateFieldList. Only fields listed in updateFieldList will be modified.

updateFieldList.description: List of field names to be updated in this operation. Only fields listed here will be modified; other fields will remain unchanged.

name.description: Group name (must be unique within the company).

rowNumber.description: Display order number. Lower numbers appear first.
